mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND status IN ('a2', 'a3')
AND (LOWER(login_id) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(user_name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE UPPER(email) = UPPER(#{email})
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'USR-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-' || ( NVL( MAX( TO_NUMBER( SUBSTR( user_code, LENGTH('USR-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-') + 1 ) ) ), 0 ) + 1 ) FROM users WHERE user_code LIKE 'USR-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-%' AND REGEXP_LIKE( SUBSTR( user_code, LENGTH('USR-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-') + 1 ), '^[0-9]+$' )
INSERT INTO users ( user_code, company_id, login_id, password, user_name, email, phone_number, create_date, status, owner_yn, admin_yn, web_notification_yn, email_notification_yn, notification_area ) VALUES ( #{userCode}, #{companyId}, #{loginId}, #{password}, #{userName}, #{email}, #{phoneNumber}, SYSDATE, 'a2', 0, NVL(#{adminYn}, 0), #{webNotificationYn}, #{emailNotificationYn}, 'ALL' )
